title: acer trifidum f. ningpoense
intro: Acer trifidum f. ningpoense is a subspecies of the Acer trifidum plant, commonly known as the white maple or the Ningbo maple, belonging to the Sapindaceae family. This plant has been traditionally used in herbal medicine for its medicinal properties, particularly for treating fever, rheumatism, and other inflammatory conditions. The health benefits of Acer trifidum f. ningpoense include its anti-inflammatory and antioxidant properties, which may help to reduce pain and improve overall well-being. In traditional herbal preparations, the leaves and bark of this plant are often used to make teas, infusions, or decoctions, which can be consumed to harness its medicinal properties.
